title: Custom eggless cake pickup until 10pm — Harris Park, Wigram Street
summary:
Pickup until 10pm. Every night. No exceptions.

If you're in Parramatta, Westmead, or Merrylands and need a custom cake on a weeknight, the Harris Park store is open when most bakeries aren't.

48-hour minimum notice is what fresh baking actually takes. After that, your cake — 100% eggless, any size from 6-inch to 16-inch, any flavour including Rasmalai or Mango — is ready at Wigram Street when your evening allows.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725. We speak Hindi and Gujarati.

Open daily 11am to 10pm.
